channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party says it plans youth-focused campaigns on unemployment, education and accountability
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), a satirical social media movement started by political communication strategist Abhijeet Dipke, has announced that it intends to evolve into an independent youth-drive...

item.title: Senior Carpenters’ Union Officials Resign Amid Investigation Into Housing Purchases and Governance Concerns
item.description: Senior leadership at the Carpenters’ Regional Council (CRC), one of Canada’s largest construction unions, has resigned amid an internal investigation triggered by reporting on the organisation’s real ...

item.title: Texas GOP lawmaker criticizes Trump-backed Ken Paxton over controversial plea deal in child abuse case
item.description: A Texas Republican state lawmaker has publicly broken with President Donald Trump over his endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the race for U.S. Senate. State Rep. Jeff Leach, who has ...

item.title: Russia launches combined drone and missile attack on Kyiv, killing at least two people
item.description: Ukrainian authorities reported that Kyiv was subjected to a large-scale aerial assault involving drones and missiles, including the use of a hypersonic ballistic missile. The attack occurred on Sunday...

item.title: Couple delivers baby on Trans-Canada Highway after local hospital maternity services suspended
item.description: A Canadian couple experienced an unexpected roadside birth after finding themselves without access to nearby hospital maternity care. According to the report, labour and delivery services at their loc...

item.title: Former Trump supporter calls for his removal, citing threat concerns
item.description: A right-wing influencer and independent journalist who describes herself as a three-time voter for Donald Trump has publicly reversed her stance, calling for the U.S. president’s removal from office. ...

item.title: Analysis of how the Christchurch attack has influenced modern extremist narratives in the San Diego shooting case
item.description: This opinion article examines how the 2019 Christchurch mosque attacks continue to influence extremist violence and rhetoric internationally, focusing on a recent case involving an Islamic centre in S...

item.title: Arsenal cap Premier League title-winning season with 2–1 victory over Crystal Palace
item.description: Arsenal concluded a remarkable Premier League campaign with a 2–1 victory over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park, wrapping up a season in which they were crowned champions for the first time in 22 years...

item.title: Photographs Documenting Manchester’s Slum Housing Crisis in the 1960s and 1970s
item.description: The article examines the severe housing conditions that existed in Manchester, England, during the 1960s and early 1970s, despite Britain’s public image as a modernizing postwar society. Thousands of ...

item.title: Spotify expands AI features across music, podcasts, and audiobooks, raising concerns about app complexity and content discovery
item.description: Spotify is rapidly transforming its platform from a traditional music streaming service into an AI-driven, all-purpose audio ecosystem. According to the article, the company has steadily expanded beyo...

item.title: Gore Verbinski’s sci-fi comedy explores AI fears through humour, time loops and human resilience
item.description: Scroll.in’s film recommendation column highlights Gore Verbinski’s science-fiction comedy ‘Good Luck, Have Fun, Don’t Die’, describing it as an imaginative and energetic film about the dangers of arti...

item.title: Winter skincare reset: how to protect and adjust your routine for colder months
item.description: This lifestyle beauty feature focuses on how to adapt skincare routines as the seasons shift from summer into winter, when colder temperatures often lead to dryness, sensitivity, breakouts, and dull s...

item.title: Toshifumi Suzuki, founder of Seven-Eleven Japan and retail innovator, passes away at 93
item.description: Toshifumi Suzuki, widely recognised as the founder of Seven-Eleven Japan and a key figure in shaping Japan’s modern convenience store industry, has died of heart failure at the age of 93. His death oc...

item.title: Analysis of shifting geopolitical balance following US–Iran tensions and China’s diplomatic role
item.description: In this opinion column, Mark Almond argues that recent geopolitical developments following a 12-week conflict in the Middle East have significantly reshaped regional and global power dynamics. Althoug...

item.title: Theatergoers praise musical ‘Makara’ for its unexpected plot twists
item.description: The musical ‘Makara’ has recently gained positive attention from theatergoers, particularly for its engaging storytelling and unexpected plot twists. According to a report by ABS-CBN News, the product...

item.title: CJ Group Executive Miky Lee Reflects on Building Korea’s Global Entertainment Industry
item.description: The CNN segment highlights the career and influence of Miky Lee, vice chairwoman of CJ Group, and her role in helping expand South Korea’s entertainment industry onto the global stage. Featured as par...

item.title: Asparagus with saffron vinaigrette and sunchoke goat cheese flan recipe by Mission Hill Estate chef
item.description: This recipe, created by Executive Chef Patrick Gayler of The Terrace Restaurant at Mission Hill Family Estate, presents a refined seasonal dish built around fresh asparagus, saffron vinaigrette, and a...

item.title: Megyn Kelly Criticizes Donald Trump’s Marital History and References Past Allegations In Podcast Appearance
item.description: In a recent appearance on the “Hodgetwins Podcast,” former Fox News host Megyn Kelly made a series of critical remarks about President Donald Trump’s personal life and past relationships. During the d...

item.title: Political confrontation between TMC and BJP escalates after Falta re-poll results amid allegations over counting process
item.description: A political confrontation has intensified between the Trinamool Congress (TMC) and the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) following the re-poll results in West Bengal’s Falta constituency. BJP candidate Deb...

item.title: Cory Booker Criticizes Trump’s Iran Negotiations, Claims Policy Is Worse Than Obama-Era Deal
item.description: Senator Cory Booker, a Democrat from New Jersey, criticized President Donald Trump’s handling of ongoing negotiations with Iran during an interview on CNN’s “State of the Union.” Booker argued that Tr...
